_comment: M9 DoD anchor — German VFR inbound to EDNY (Friedrichshafen) via VRP 'Sierra'. The pilot identifies the VRP with the 'approaching' position marker, which triggers intent_parser to switch INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND -> INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP. Tower responds with the German VRP-clearance template ('frei zum Einflug in die Kontrollzone ueber Sierra, Piste 24, melden Sie im Gegenanflug').
name: DE VRP inbound — EDNY Friedrichshafen via Sierra

say.note: Step 1 — Pilot calls Tower from VRP Sierra at 2000 ft inbound for landing. Marker 'approaching' tells the VRP parser to look at the next word; 'sierra' matches the registered EDNY VRP and the intent is upgraded to INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP.
say.text: Friedrichshafen Tower, Delta Echo Whiskey Lima Yankee, approaching Sierra at 2000 feet, inbound for landing
